mapper.select: SELECT sum(amount) sum_asset, sum(CASE WHEN asset_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) saving_asset, sum(CASE WHEN asset_type != 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) invest_asset FROM t_asset_ledger
SELECT (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_type' AND d.`code` = asset_type LIMIT 1) TEXT, sum(amount) VALUE FROM t_asset_ledger GROUP BY asset_type
